mapper.sql: id, conversation_id, user_id, typing_type, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO im_typing_status (conversation_id, user_id, typing_type, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{conversationId}, #{userId}, #{typingType}, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE typing_type = VALUES(typing_type), update_time = NOW()
